channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bruins trade big forward Trent Frederic to the Oilers in a 3-team deal with the Devils
item.description: The defending Western Conference champion Edmonton Oilers made their first big move ahead of the NHL trade deadline Tuesday, acquiring hard-nosed forward Trent Frederic from the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Darius Slay's wife shares heartbreaking message after Eagles cut him to save money for free agency
item.description: Jennifer Slay, the wife of cornerback Darius Slay, posted a heartbreaking message on social media after the Philadelphia Eagles released him to save money against their cap.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Attorneys in college sports lawsuit point to 'intergalactic paradigm shift' for NCAA
item.description: Attorneys seeking approval of the $2.8 billion legal settlement for college sports pointed to nearly 102,000 athletes who signed up to receive damages from the action, while batting down objections to what they described as the “intergalactic paradigm shift” the settlement will create across the NCA
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: In Lake Placid, a pair of athletes are sliding for Ukraine. They hope better days are ahead
item.description: LAKE PLACID, N.Y. (AP) — The final race of the headfirst-sliding sport known as skeleton awaits Ukrainian athletes Vladyslav Heraskevych and Yaroslav Lavreniuk. After that, they're going home. They don't know what awaits when they get there.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Eagles make Barkley highest-paid running back with 2-year, $41.2M deal, AP source says
item.description: Saquon Barkley will become the highest-paid running back in NFL history after his record-setting season helped the Philadelphia Eagles win the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: ACC, Clemson, Florida State approve settlement to end legal fight, change revenue-distribution model
item.description: The Atlantic Coast Conference, Clemson and Florida State have approved a settlement that would end their legal fights.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Riley Gaines opens up on possibly running for office as she fights against Dems letting males in girls' sports
item.description: Riley Gaines told Fox News Digital that it is very possible she runs for public office in the future and even has a role model in mind that she would emulate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jimmy Johnson retires from Fox Sports after being a face of its NFL coverage for most of 3 decades
item.description: Jimmy Johnson, the Pro Football Hall of Fame coach who won two Super Bowls and a college national championship, announced his retirement from Fox Sports on Monday after being part of its NFL coverage for most of the network's 31 years.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON and JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz lose to Pelicans in battle for last place, 128-121
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The victories just aren't that important right now for the Utah Jazz. Getting their younger players game experience in the priority, and plenty of young guys saw the floor Sunday in a 128-121 loss to New Orleans Sunday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New Jersey cools off Utah HC, 3-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The New Jersey Devils scored twice in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-1 at Delta Center on Saturday, ending Utah's three-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: RSL shuts out Seattle in MLS home opener, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Having scored just one goal in its first three games of the 2025 campaign, Real Salt Lake got some help from the Seattle Sounders on its way to a 2-0 victory in its MLS home opener Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes beat BYU on half-court overtime buzzer-beater
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes women's basketball team ended the regular season with a bang. Matyson Wilke hit a half-court shot at the buzzer as the Utes avoided a major upset against BYU Saturday afternoon at the Huntsman Center, 76-73.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, NewsNation
